jobs.title: Creative Strategist (B2B Performance Marketing)
jobs.description: Intro Bei Arvana bauen wir die erste AI-native Go-To-Market Agentur in DACH. Seit 2024 sind wir auf über €5M ARR und 30+ Leute im Team gewachsen. Wir arbeiten mit über 200 B2B-Tech-Unternehmen zusammen, darunter FreeNow, SmapOne, Swisscom und Klett. Als Performance Creative Manager verantwortest du Design, Story und Messaging unserer Ad Creatives und Landingpages - die Assets, über die monatlich sechsstellige Budgets in Paid Search und Paid Social laufen. Wir arbeiten zahlengetrieben und schnell - ohne lange Abstimmungsschleifen. Du triffst kreative Entscheidungen eigenständig und siehst in den Performance-Daten direkt, was deine Arbeit bewirkt. Da unsere Kunden ausschließlich im B2B-Umfeld
jobs.why: This is a direct match for his creative strategy skills, focusing on the design, story, and messaging of performance ad creatives.
jobs.proposal_opener: I write the high-converting hook-reveal scripts and design the ad frameworks that stop the B2B scroll and convert attention into pipeline.
jobs.flags: DACH-focused agency; likely requires German language skills.
jobs.summary: This role is responsible for the design, storytelling, and messaging of ad creatives for a rapidly growing B2B performance marketing agency. You will shape the visual and narrative strategies to drive performance for over 200 B2B tech clients.

jobs.title: Social Media & Content Creatorin für zwei wachsende Family-Health-Marken
jobs.description: Wir sind 12minutes und ouchie: ein Erste-Hilfe-Kurs für (werdende) Eltern und trendige Erste-Hilfe-Sets für Familien. Zwei junge Marken mit einer Mission, die Menschen wirklich berührt und mit richtig viel Social-Media-Potenzial. Wir suchen jemanden, der aus Produktideen scroll-stoppende Reels macht und unsere Marken auf Instagram und TikTok sichtbar wächst. Die Stelle ist 100 % remote, mit freier Zeiteinteilung; wählbar als Teilzeit , Minijob oder Freelance mit 10-20 Stunden die Woche . Aufgaben Deine Aufgaben (Schwerpunkt Content): Du entwickelst Content-Ideen und -Konzepte für Instagram und TikTok – von Hook über Skript bis Storyboard und setzt sie in Reels und Carousels um. Du erkennst T
jobs.why: It perfectly fits his ability to write scroll-stopping short-form video scripts (Reels/TikTok), but it is a German-language, local-creator role.
jobs.proposal_opener: Want to turn your family-health product ideas into high-converting, scroll-stopping Reels? I write the precise hooks and pattern interrupts that keep parents watching.
jobs.flags: Requires fluent German and local content creation/filming.
jobs.summary: This role involves creating engaging, scroll-stopping social media content like Reels and TikToks for two growing family health brands. The goal is to translate product ideas into highly visible, emotional social media campaigns.

jobs.title: Senior Global Integrated B2B Marketing Manager
jobs.description: About Wolt At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we're building the delivery of (almost) everything and you'll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe. Working at Wolt isn't always easy, but it's definitely exciting. Here you'll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You'll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you're a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be t
jobs.why: This is a highly senior, global management role that is far more strategic and corporate than direct-response copywriting.
jobs.proposal_opener: I help B2B brands scale by turning complex product features into sharp, direct-response copy that drives user acquisition.
jobs.flags: Very senior role; requires extensive global B2B marketing experience.
jobs.summary: This senior-level position leads the global integrated marketing strategy to drive B2B customer acquisition and engagement for Wolt. It involves managing multi-channel campaigns and collaborating with global cross-functional teams.
